title: Night Walk
subtitle: Discover Monteverde after dark
description: Experience the cloud forest in a completely different way after sunset. During this guided night walk, a local naturalist will help you discover the fascinating nocturnal wildlife of Monteverde.
details: Best for: Wildlife lovers and first-time visitors

title: Private Night Walk
subtitle: A private wildlife experience
description: Enjoy a more personal and flexible night walk through the Monteverde cloud forest with a dedicated guide focused entirely on your group.
details: Includes: Flashlight and private naturalist guide
Best for: Families, photographers, and couples

title: Bird Watching Tour
subtitle: Explore one of the world’s top birding destinations
description: Monteverde is one of the best birdwatching destinations in the world. Join an experienced guide to search for toucans, hummingbirds, motmots and the famous resplendent quetzal.
details: Includes: Birding guide and spotting scope
Best for: Nature lovers and bird enthusiasts

title: Cloud Forest Wildlife Walk
subtitle: Discover the biodiversity of Monteverde
description: Explore the lush cloud forest while spotting wildlife such as monkeys, birds, and fascinating insects while learning about the ecosystem of Monteverde.

title: Sunrise Forest Walk
subtitle: Experience the forest as it wakes up
description: Start your day surrounded by the sounds of the cloud forest. Birds begin singing, animals become active, and the forest comes alive.
details: Best for: Wildlife and photography lovers
